reviews.comment:
Solo cargue combustible, la atención fue buena, pocos surtidores para el caudal de autos que hay en temporada, la veces que intente hospedarme no conseguí lugar para el mismo día

(Translated by Google)
I only filled up my car park, the service was good, there were only a few pumps for the seasonal volume of cars. The few times I tried to stay there I couldn't get a spot for the same day.

reviews.comment:
Una estación muy concurrida ya que es el paso a otra provincia. Es chica para el flujo vehicular. Sobretodo en fines de semanas o re cambio vacacional.

(Translated by Google)
A very busy station as it's the gateway to another province. It's too small for traffic, especially on weekends or during vacation breaks.
